title: Carp's Paxels
description: This mod adds Paxels, which can mine Pickaxe blocks, Axe blocks and Shovel blocks.
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## SCULK TOOLS MOVED TO A DIFFERENT MOD, PLEASE SEE MY [Sculk Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-equipment)!
### _(Sculk Paxel and Sculk Depather still require this mod to be present alongside the new mod if you wish to keep them!)_

</details>


** **
This mod adds Paxels, which can mine Pickaxe blocks, Axe blocks and Shovel blocks.

 

Besides the wide block breaking efficiency, the Paxels can also **turn dirt into paths**, **paths into farmland**, **farmland back into paths** and **strip logs**.

To compensate for that, another tool has been added called the "depather". This tool **turns paths and farmland back into dirt** and **can turn stripped logs back into regular logs**.
** **
 

Both tools can be crafted with all vanilla tool materials.

Crafting recipes:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(These recipes are the same for all materials except Netherite, which make use of the Smithing Table)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb9fc88eeda970302145b24c07c5b3a00fe69ab6.png)
 
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb8c7bc3f1eee189becbeb7dfdc63c94ba43bf71.png)
 

</details>


For Netherite tools, use the following recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/959b037bd62be96c27e71fb1469595277aae8c24.png)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/998d50be973e3d3b8aa4b5bc28cb5693132c21f5.png)

</details>

This mod can also integrate into my other mod, Sculk Equipment to add the Sculk Paxel and Sculk Depather (formerly in version 0.0.3.x of this mod)
